# rh-ssg-release-notes

Review Red Hat release notes for SSG compliance — tense rules (present default, past for before this update), informative headings (sentence case, no gerunds, under 120 chars), Jira references on known/fixed issues, AsciiDoc formatting (description lists, + attachment), and release note types such as new features, enhancements, rebases (X.Y.Z format), Technology Preview entries, deprecated features, removed features, known issues (Cause > Consequence > Workaround > Result), and fixed issues (CCFR pattern). Use this skill whenever reviewing, writing, or checking release notes for any Red Hat product.


**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
/rh-ssg-release-notes
```
